nodes.content: LLM Refinement Proposal for breakout_trend.py: Funding rate mean has shifted from +0.01% to +0.005% over the past 14 days.  Lowering the min_funding_rate entry threshold will let the strategy capture 22% more opportunities without increasing drawdown.

LLM Refinement Proposal for funding_arbitrage.py: Funding rate mean has shifted from +0.01% to +0.005% over the past 14 days.  Lowering the min_funding_rate entry threshold will let the strategy capture 22% more opportunities without increasing drawdown.
